text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Takarazuka Kinen now behind her,
Silence Suzuka buckles down for her goal
race—the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But until then, she spends her days training in
preparation for her next race—the Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa and Grass Wonder eagerly wait
for their chance to race against Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They issue their challenge and promise to meet
her at the starting gates of the Mainichi Okan.
